text.title: Design Review Facilitation Script Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Design Review Facilitation Script.

example.scenario: 45-min review of checkout v3. 3 reviewers (eng, PM, a11y). Clarify (4 questions), critique (7 critiques), suggest (5 alternatives). Triage: 3 must-fix items; designer commits to 2, declines 1 with reason. JIRA tickets BCC-101, BCC-102 created.
example.trace: r1-three-round-format → r2-review-ask-up-front → r3-one-must-fix-per-reviewer → r4-commit-or-decline-on-the-spot → review stored
